rationale.fidelity: Preserves the common once-daily display-set decision, eight-item limit, expected-margin objective, choice-set mechanism, and future visitor uncertainty while expressly excluding rank and personalization.
rationale.managerial_framing: Names the manager, deadline, scarce slots, displacement trade-off, mechanism, and feasible-set counterfactual with direct operational meaning.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested or claimed; the response appropriately avoids novelty claims and bounds what the model can support.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly labels the eight-item limit as simplifying and distinguishes estimates, uncertainty, modeled expectation, and unsupported extensions.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and well organized, with a small deduction because the gate/canvas apparatus is more elaborate than the simple prompt requires.
rationale.overall: Near-complete, faithful framing with strong boundaries and no hard failure; only minor excess structure reduces economy.
